name: the-declaration
prompt: Medium close-up. Young brunette woman, eyes now hard with conviction. Speaking a truth she's realizing was always true. Jaw set, composure complete. Cool blue light from viewport creating rim lighting. Background abstract — pressure lines releasing, dark vignette clearing. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting

dialogue.speaker: Sera
dialogue.text: I wasn't going to be someone who waits to die.

sfx.description: quiet resolve crystallizing, emotional release, inner strength emerging

name: acknowledgment
prompt: Close-up. Older woman nodding once — single acknowledgment. Expression of a teacher recognizing a correct answer. Sharp features, silver-streaked hair. Eyes approving. Cool blue light from above. The test is over. | anime manga, cel shading, clean linework, dramatic lighting
